title: Timeline Collision Hero
description: One wide cinematic image combining three life stages of the same fictional woman in a folded mirror room.
creative_direction: Single-image package demo. This overlaps with the existing character-portrait series and should be treated as a structure example, not the ideal next creative direction.

en.title: Timeline Collision Hero
en.description: One wide cinematic image combining three life stages of the same fictional woman in a folded mirror room.

zh-CN.title: 时间线碰撞主视觉
zh-CN.description: 一张宽幅电影感图像，把同一位虚构女性的三个人生阶段合并到折叠镜厅中。
